JUDGE SARAH SPERO, RPT. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. MICHAEL J. RAIFSNIDER ATTY. FOR DEFT. RUTH N. BORENSTEIN 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. STIP. SETTLMNT: PLTF. TO HAVE POSSESSION OF 320 TURK ST, #505. DEFT. TO VACATE BY 7/1/94 BY 5PM. PLTF. WVS. RENT TIL 7/1/94. EACH SIDE PAY OWN ATTY. FEES. WRIT. ISSUE F/W. EACH SIDE RELEASE THE OTHER. TERMS OF SETTLMNT TO BE CONFIDENTIAL. PLTF. TO PROVIDE REFERENCE. NO NOTICE TO ANY CREDIT AGENCY. PLTF. TO FIX DOOR. BLDG. MGR TO DEAL WITH WILL BE GEORGE, NOT PAUL.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 01, MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, CALENDAR OF JUN-17-1994, OFF CALENDAR OFF CAENDAR. PARTIES FAILED TO APPEAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, BENJAMIN NAVARRO, JUAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 320 TURK ST, APT. 505, SFCA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE F/W. DEFTS. MOVE OUT BY 5PM 7/1/94. PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT. PLTF. HOLDS NO SEC. DEPOSIT. NO OTHER OCCULPANTS. DEFTS. WILL LEAVE PLACE IN CLEAN CONDITION. DEFTS. ABANDON PERSONAL PROP. WAIVE ANY FURTHER CLAIMS. JUDGMNT. WILL BE MAINTAINED IN CONFIDENCE.
